comment.body:
Intraday Plan – SPX · Thursday, July 31

Quick Context
	•	Pre-market trades at 6427, well above the intraday centroid 6343 and yesterday’s close (6362).
	•	Breaking above 6400–6420 pushes us into positive gamma territory: dealers hedge by buying, which usually supports upward moves as long as spot stays above 6405.

Operational Guide
	1.	Bullish bias while price holds ≥ 6415–6420.
	•	Targets/magnets: 6450 (OI cluster) and 6475 (momentum extension).
	2.	6405 is key: sustained failure below it kills the impulse and redirects price toward 6375 → 6350.
	3.	A clean break of 6375 reopens the downside gap toward 6300 (structural support).
	4.	Volatility ranges (±0.74% from 6427) point to approximate daily barriers at 6380 / 6475; manage partials as these levels are approached.
	5.	In positive gamma terrain, pullbacks are usually brief; intraday traders often treat 6420–6405 as a buy‑the‑dip zone until it’s decisively broken.

Not financial advice
